sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n77181" key="pana/gorsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παν-άγορσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n77181.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">παναγορία</ref></xr>, ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">26</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
